name: Vent Mode Agent
description: Ephemeral, privilege-preserving session agent for exploratory legal reasoning. Auto-logout with dead-man's switch after 45 minutes of inactivity. No export, no copy, no persistent storage beyond Kovel attestation receipts.

skills.name: Ephemeral Legal Research
skills.description: Exploratory legal reasoning with automatic session expiry. No persistent transcripts.

skills.name: Multi-Model Selector
skills.description: Client selects from available LLMs (Gemini, Claude, ChatGPT, Grok, Perplexity) for research.
